tiers.label: Advisory-only
tiers.description: No authoritative network-derived evidence; advisory diagnostics only.

tiers.label: Anchored
tiers.description: Initial authoritative anchoring with structural gates.

tiers.label: Corroborated
tiers.description: Corroborated release evidence with structural and set-membership gates.

tiers.label: Distributional
tiers.description: Distributional and classifier-style evidence enabled when sample power qualifies.
